title: Thai Coconut Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Thai-inspired stir fry with coconut milk, crispy vegetables, and nutty flavors.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper and stir-fry until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the snow peas and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the peanut butter, stir-fry sauce, and 1 tablespoon of coconut milk.
Pour the peanut butter mixture into the skillet and stir-fry until the sauce thickens, about 1-2 minutes.
Stir in the remaining coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let simmer for 2-3 minutes, or until heated through.
Garnish with chopped peanuts or scallions, if desired.
